Text:
■Basic Rules
Players can enter the Occult Crescent solo or in a party. It is possible to form a party even after entering the instance.

■Requirements
A <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Disciple of War or Magic level 100 or higher<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> is required to enter, and the <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>required average item level is 690<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

■Restrictions
Once inside, you are free to change to any Disciple of War or Magic that meets the requirements to enter. However, you cannot change jobs in certain circumstances, including while participating in a critical encounter.

All expeditions on the Occult Crescent are level synced, with <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>character levels adjusted to 100, and all equipment adjusted to item level 700<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

■Basic Rules
Players can enter the Occult Crescent solo, in a party, or in an alliance of between nine and 48 players. It is possible to form a party even after entering the instance.

■Requirements
A <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Disciple of War or Magic level 100 or higher<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> is required to enter, and the <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>required average item level is 690<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

■Restrictions
Once inside, you are free to change to any Disciple of War or Magic that meets the requirements to enter. However, you cannot change jobs in certain circumstances, including while participating in a critical encounter.

All expeditions on the Occult Crescent are level synced, with <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>character levels adjusted to 100, and all equipment adjusted to item level 700<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
